---
title: "Videos"
subtitle: "Video companions with context, references and room to continue the mathematics."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: mn-videos-featured
    contents: entries
    include:
      featured: true
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    max-items: 4
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: mn-videos-latest
    contents: entries
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 2
    fields: [image, title, description, date, categories]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed:
      items: 20
      type: partial
      title: "Videos from Math Nomad"
---

::: {.content-block .mn-page-lead}
Each YouTube video will have a companion page here: an extended description, key ideas, references, related notes and any corrections or later developments.
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-video-anatomy}
::: {}
<p class="mn-kicker">EACH COMPANION PAGE</p>

## More than an embed

A video page is designed to remain useful after watching. It will connect the spoken explanation to definitions, examples and places to continue.
:::

::: {.mn-structure-list}
<span>VIDEO</span>
<span>EXTENDED DESCRIPTION</span>
<span>KEY IDEAS & TIMESTAMPS</span>
<span>REFERENCES</span>
<span>RELATED MATERIAL</span>
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
<p class="mn-kicker">PINNED</p>

## Featured videos

::: {#mn-videos-featured}
:::
:::

::: {.content-block .mn-listing-section}
## Latest videos

::: {.mn-empty-state}
The first video companion is being prepared. Once published, new videos will automatically appear here with the latest at the top.
:::

::: {#mn-videos-latest}
:::
:::
